# Noob to Root

> Hands-on tech tutorials, ethical hacking guides, Linux, networking, DevOps, and developer walkthroughs — from zero to root.

Noob to Root is a tutorial blog and learning academy for curious learners. We publish practical, command-line-first guides and interactive courses with quizzes, terminal practice, and verifiable certificates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured tutorials and latest posts.
- [Blog](/blog): All tutorials and guides.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse tutorials by topic (Linux, hacking, networking, DevOps).
- [Courses](/courses): Interactive courses with terminal practice and certificates.
- [About](/about): About Noob to Root and the team.
